creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
You should put the MAN descriptions before the bsd.port.pre.mk,
and add:

MLINKS=         pfsoutppm.1 pfsouttiff.1 \
                pfsoutppm.1 pfsoutrgbe.1

I didn't get lib/libpfs-1.2.so.0.0, I got lib/libpfs-1.2.so.0 and
lib/libpfs-1.2.so

And somehow the pkgconfig file should move from lib/pkgconfig/pfs.pc
to libdata/pkgconfig (portlint)

Edwin
